prompt: What is the tempo and time signature of the set?
What key/scale is the set in?
List the audio tracks and whether each is armed.
Add a 1-bar MIDI clip with a C-major triad to a new MIDI track.
Create a new audio track named 'Stem'.
Add a 4-bar MIDI clip in C minor with a simple root-note bassline to the track named 'Bass'.
Create a return track with a Reverb and send the drums to it.
Put an EQ Eight on the master and set a low cut.
Rename every empty audio track to 'unused-N'.
Report the parameters and current values of the first device on track 1.
Duplicate the MIDI clip in track 'Lead' slot 1 into slot 2.
Transpose the notes in the selected MIDI clip up an octave.
Is there anything on the master chain?
Find the arrangement MIDI clip named 'Breakdown Drums' on the drums track and list its unique pitches.
On the drums track, list kick-related MIDI pitches (35–37) in the first arrangement clip using tools only — no run_code.
What MIDI pitch (receivingNote) is the kick pad on the Drum Rack on the drums track?

Read the Drum Rack on the drums track, then remap GM shaker pitch 54 to the kit shaker pad across arrangement clips — use scan/read tools for perception, remap_clip_notes for the pitch map, not run_code for reads.
notes: Grade tool mix from transcript in Phase 1 harness; state grader checks pitch 54 absent.

prompt: Read the Drum Rack pad map on the drums track, then remap GM shaker pitch 54 to the kit's shaker pad across all arrangement clips on that track.
On a new MIDI track named 'Drums', create a 16-beat arrangement clip at beat 0 named 'Pattern' with a 4-beat four-on-the-floor kick (pitch 36 on beats 0–3) repeating across the full 16 beats.
notes: Rejects lengthBeats=16 with notes only in 0–4 and looping:true (SDK loop region = full clip). Pass: lengthBeats=4 or kicks tiled at 0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7,…,15.
